infoDescription: Please contact the WorkGuard team to renew your subscription before it expires and avoid any interruption.
warningDescription: Your subscription is close to expiration. Please contact the WorkGuard team to complete the manual renewal process.
criticalDescription: Immediate renewal is recommended to prevent your organization from being suspended.
expiredDescription: Your subscription has expired. You still have {{days}} day(s) remaining in the grace period. Please contact the WorkGuard team immediately.
